info@proluxetravels.com

London, United Kingdom

Bureau by ProLuxe

One record for every booking. The desk handles the rest.

Bureau is the console the office works from. Every hotel, every room, every change held against the principal's programme. The booker sees tighter operations, fewer surprises, the same person to call when something moves.

01 / Every booking in one programme view.

Every booking in one programme view.

Status across every hotel and city, updating as bookings move. Filter by trip, by date, by hotel. The view the office sees is the view the desk works from.

02 / Changes handled in 2 steps.

Changes handled in 2 steps.

The booker edits a booking in place, or clicks Pass back to send it across. No re-explaining. The hotel sees the same booking the desk does.

03 / Every confirmation, timestamped.

Every confirmation, timestamped.

Every change is logged with who, what, and when. If a question comes up later, the answer sits in the file.

How it works for the office

Bureau is configured before the office logs in. Hotels, room categories, rates, daily holds, all reflecting what the desk has already negotiated. From there, every booking sits in one place.

When something needs to change, the booker adjusts it in place. When it needs the desk, the booker clicks Pass back. Either way, the trail is clean and the hotel sees the same booking.

The Security overwatch tab shown in the mockup is an optional add-on. The desk runs it with Colossus Intelligence on programmes where protective intelligence is in scope. Scoped and quoted per programme, separate from the standard Bureau engagement.

bureau.proluxetravels.com/events/[programme]/

Programmes

Programme 1
4 cities
Programme 2
3 cities
Programme 3
3 cities
Hotel programme Security overwatch
Programme 1
4 bookings
Live
All bookings Confirmed Pending Changes this week
Record Dates Room Status

What it does

The capabilities the office sees on day one.

A quote-acceptance step that pins the proposal before the dashboard opens. The principal party in one view across roles. Changes that run in place or hand back to the desk. An optional protective intelligence layer for trips that take one.

01

Quote acceptance, before the dashboard goes live.

For principal travel, the booker sends a brief and we come back with one itinerary across the trip. They approve, or they steer; we revise and come back. The dashboard opens behind the accepted plan, with rooms grouped by the roles in the party. The same console handles a conference programme through a configurator mode the team uses to build the allocation directly.

bureau.proluxetravels.com / events / proposal

Your proposal

Hotel A · The Royal Suite

4 nights · principal suite plus 3 entourage rooms

Mayfair address, recently refurbished Royal Suite, discreet entry off a side street. Connecting rooms held next door for the security detail.

Approve Request changes

02

The trip view the office opens to.

Days to departure, outstanding actions, party status, hotels on the itinerary, spend against the agreed ceiling. Counters move as the desk works the trip. Filter by hotel, party member, or date. The view the booker sees is the view the desk works from.

bureau.proluxetravels.com / events / dashboard
14
Days to departure
2
Outstanding
3
Hotels
Hotel A
4 nights
Hotel B
3 nights
Hotel C
2 nights

03

Changes the office runs, or hands across.

Edit the booking in place when it sits inside the agreed itinerary. Pass back when it needs the desk. The hotel sees the same record either way. Every action logged with who, what, and when.

bureau.proluxetravels.com / booking / REF-204
Resend confirmationDirect
Change datesDirect
Pass to ProLuxeWe handle it

Logged: M. Carter, 09:14. Awaiting Resolved.

04

The principal party in one view.

Principal, security, assistants. Each line sits under the approved itinerary with its own room type, occupancy, and rate. The booker sees the whole party in a single view; the desk sees the same view the booker does, no exports, no double entry.

bureau.proluxetravels.com / events / dashboard
Principal
1/1
Security
2/2
Assistants
1/1
Family
0/2

One view of the party. The same view the desk works from.

05

Intelligence on the same dashboard.

Each programme can carry a Security overwatch tab. Protective intelligence, zone classifications, and pre-event briefs from Colossus, on the same dashboard the office is already using. Optional add-on, quoted per programme.

bureau.proluxetravels.com / events / dashboard
Hotel programme Security overwatch
City One
Zone A
City Two
Zone A
City Three
Zone B
City Four
Zone A
Colossus

Always on hand

A booking can come back to the desk at any point. A late change from the principal, a question on a payment, anything that would cost the booker an hour. The booker passes it across and the desk takes it on. The booker stays with the rest of the trip.

Pass back

Rate or room change, a new category, a date shift, or an upgrade needing director-level sign-off.
Last-minute move, a venue or hotel change inside 48 hours with knock-on bookings to rearrange.
Anything the desk should own, a complaint, a billing dispute, a property question that needs a direct hotel relationship to resolve.

The desk takes on a small number of new principals' programmes for 2026. For an office setting up the principal's next year of travel, please write.

Speak with the desk
ProLuxe Travel

Corporate & luxury travel management.
